name: Crab and Green Onion Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Bake pie crust for 10 minutes.
3. Sprinkle the bottom of the pie crust with cheese.
4. Chop onions and melt butter in a frying pan.
5. Add chopped onions and cook until soft.
6. Gently mix the cooked onions with crabmeat and spoon evenly over the cheese in the pie crust.
7. In a bowl, beat eggs with half-and-half, lemon juice, lemon peel, salt, and mustard.
8. Pour the egg mixture evenly over the crab mixture.
9. Sprinkle additional cheese on top.
10. Bake for 55-60 minutes, or until the center is set and firm. Let cool for 15 minutes before serving.
11. The pie can also be served at room temperature.
